description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow consists of multiple ubuntu-latest jobs: smoke-sketches, run-simulator-tests, check-code-style, check-shellcheck, check-cpplint, find-filename-conflicts, and publish-arduino-package-on-every-commit. Each job checks out the repository and performs specific tasks such as setting up the environment, caching dependencies, running tests, checking code style, and publishing an Arduino package.
